description: Style Note deni yo jeans with their cotton fabric are comfortable. Never lacking in style, you can bank on these jeans for a highly stylised look. Unusual, these white jeans can be paired with a black shirt and leather shoes for a sharp look on an evening out. Or, you can pair them with contrasting tees for a casual look for a day out. Product Details White jeans, has a button and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waistband at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right insert pocket, branding embroidered on the coin pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
